TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: sakasenengan aku a labang:Śįäśē¨ÁöĄšĻėŚģĘśā®Ś•Ĺ: nikacawan namu tu tusa malebut tusa idaw ku tasa caay tu pacubelis a silamalay, anusawni katukuh tu pangiduwan. . sakapahen musilemud ku lusid datengen, amana katawal masidsida. . anu mudebu sakamuen namin ku mikacawau kukay han . . anu mahicahica ku sasukapah laecus namu, šłćŤęĖšĹ†ŚÄĎÁöĄťóúšŅāŚ¶āšĹē, ayda inanipiliwku, anu mahicahica . kapahay laecusay.Ś•ĹÁöĄŚ£ěÁöĄ. payawan napacabay tisuwan muculil haw niculilan tu tusamalebut tusa idaw ku tusa amihcaan 2022ŚĻī. kiyu inani piliwku isu kiya idaw ku dadateneng, idaw ku pitulin, idaw ku katineng, datengenibalucu'. . adasay han naku kita mikacawy alabang, salihalay han tinasadikuday a silamalay . ngay anu dawniay a silamalay a kakacawan tusa malebut tusa idaw ku tulu amihcaan sakapah daesu han. amaedem tu ku aydaay amihcaan.2022Ść≥ŚįáÁĶźśĚü suluhan naku ku numidukaay takuwan Śā∑śąĎÁöĄšļļŚéüŤęíšĹ† ahican naca han naku ku nidukasn naku.śąĎŚā∑ÁöĄšļļŚįćšłćŤĶ∑ kukay han naku ku maydihay takuwan.śĄõśąĎÁöĄšļļŤ¨ĚŤ¨ĚšĹ† pasepi han tu ku kaydihan naku.śąĎśĄõÁöĄšļļÁ•ĚÁ¶ŹšĹ† namakabalucu'mikukay kaku tu napacabay takuwan ťô™śąĎÁöĄšļļśĄüśŅÄšĹ† u midatengay takuwan kabilil.śÉ≥śąĎÁöĄšļļŤęčÁĻľÁļĆ mangelu' tu kubalycu' pahanganni.ŚŅÉÁīĮšļÜšľĎśĀĮšľĎśĀĮ mangelu' ku tademaw salihalai henay.šļļÁīĮšļÜśĒĺť¨ÜśĒĺť¨Ü u malawpesa tu cayay tu kataluma Ś§ĪŚéĽÁöĄšłćŚÜćŚõěšĺÜ u tayniay kasaetim.ŚąįšĺÜÁöĄśõīŚä†ÁŹćśÉú tusa malebut tusa idaw ku tulu, ainiw tu.2023ŚĻīŚć≥ŚįáŚąįšĺÜ u kapahay katayni , laecusay banatu, saekeng tu udip kaytini tu, u imelang kayada tu, daesu han naku ku mamin nay a laluma'an cabay. saekeng han! sakapah han! salihalay han !ŚĀ•Śļ∑!ŚĻ≥ŚģČ!ŚŅęś®ā uekeng saicelangen ! malucabay had adauc ! .
S.PHON: sakas…ôn…ôŇčan aku a r~…ĺabaŇč:*******: nika ¶awan namu tu tusa mar~…ĺ…ôbut tusa idaw ku tasa ¶aaj tu pa ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, anusawni katukuńß tu paŇčiduwan. . sakapańß…ôn musir~…ĺ…ômud ku r~…ĺusid dat…ôŇč…ôn, amana katawar~…ĺ masidsida. . anu mud…ôbu sakamu…ôn namin ku mika ¶awau kukaj ńßan . . anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a ku sasukapańß r~…ĺa…ô ¶us namu, *********, ajda inanipir~…ĺiwku, anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a . kapańßaj r~…ĺa…ô ¶usaj.****. pajawan napa ¶abaj tisuwan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ńßaw ni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan tu tusamar~…ĺ…ôbut tusa idaw ku tusa amińß ¶aan *****. kiju inani pir~…ĺiwku isu kija idaw ku dadat…ôn…ôŇč, idaw ku pitur~…ĺin, idaw ku katin…ôŇč, dat…ôŇč…ônibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. . adasaj ńßan naku kita mika ¶awj ar~…ĺabaŇč, sar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ńßan tinasadikudaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj . Ňčaj anu dawniaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a kaka ¶awan tusa mar~…ĺ…ôbut tusa idaw ku tur~…ĺu amińß ¶aan sakapańß da…ôsu ńßan. ama…ôd…ôm tu ku ajdaaj amińß ¶aan.******** sur~…ĺuńßan naku ku numidukaaj takuwan ******* ańßi ¶an na ¶a ńßan naku ku nidukasn naku.******* kukaj ńßan naku ku majdińßaj takuwan.******* pas…ôpi ńßan tu ku kajdińßan naku.******* namakabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °mikukaj kaku tu napa ¶abaj takuwan ******* u midat…ôŇčaj takuwan kabir~…ĺir~…ĺ.******* maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu kubar~…ĺj ¶u Ē~ ° pańßaŇčanni.******* maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku tad…ômaw sar~…ĺińßar~…ĺai ńß…ônaj.******* u mar~…ĺawp…ôsa tu ¶ajaj tu katar~…ĺuma ******* u tajniaj kasa…ôtim.******* tusa mar~…ĺ…ôbut tusa idaw ku tur~…ĺu, ainiw tu.********* u kapańßaj katajni , r~…ĺa…ô ¶usaj banatu, sa…ôk…ôŇč tu udip kajtini tu, u im…ôr~…ĺaŇč kajada tu, da…ôsu ńßan naku ku mamin naj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an ¶abaj. sa…ôk…ôŇč ńßan! sakapańß ńßan! sar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ńßan !**!**!** u…ôk…ôŇč sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč…ôn ! mar~…ĺu ¶abaj ńßad adau ¶ ! .
S.FORM: sakasenengan aku a labang:Śįäśē¨ÁöĄšĻėŚģĘśā®Ś•Ĺ: nikacawan namu tu tusa malebut tusa idaw ku tasa caay tu pacubelis a silamalay, anusawni katukuh tu pangiduwan. . sakapahen musilemud ku lusid datengen, amana katawal masidsida. . anu mudebu sakamuen namin ku mikacawau kukay han . . anu mahicahica ku sasukapah laecus namu, šłćŤęĖšĹ†ŚÄĎÁöĄťóúšŅāŚ¶āšĹē, ayda inanipiliwku, anu mahicahica . kapahay laecusay.Ś•ĹÁöĄŚ£ěÁöĄ. payawan napacabay tisuwan muculil haw niculilan tu tusamalebut tusa idaw ku tusa amihcaan 2022ŚĻī. kiyu inani piliwku isu kiya idaw ku dadateneng, idaw ku pitulin, idaw ku katineng, datengenibalucu'. . adasay han naku kita mikacawy alabang, salihalay han tinasadikuday a silamalay . ngay anu dawniay a silamalay a kakacawan tusa malebut tusa idaw ku tulu amihcaan sakapah daesu han. amaedem tu ku aydaay amihcaan.2022Ść≥ŚįáÁĶźśĚü suluhan naku ku numidukaay takuwan Śā∑śąĎÁöĄšļļŚéüŤęíšĹ† ahican naca han naku ku nidukasn naku.śąĎŚā∑ÁöĄšļļŚįćšłćŤĶ∑ kukay han naku ku maydihay takuwan.śĄõśąĎÁöĄšļļŤ¨ĚŤ¨ĚšĹ† pasepi han tu ku kaydihan naku.śąĎśĄõÁöĄšļļÁ•ĚÁ¶ŹšĹ† namakabalucu'mikukay kaku tu napacabay takuwan ťô™śąĎÁöĄšļļśĄüśŅÄšĹ† u midatengay takuwan kabilil.śÉ≥śąĎÁöĄšļļŤęčÁĻľÁļĆ mangelu' tu kubalycu' pahanganni.ŚŅÉÁīĮšļÜšľĎśĀĮšľĎśĀĮ mangelu' ku tademaw salihalai henay.šļļÁīĮšļÜśĒĺť¨ÜśĒĺť¨Ü u malawpesa tu cayay tu kataluma Ś§ĪŚéĽÁöĄšłćŚÜćŚõěšĺÜ u tayniay kasaetim.ŚąįšĺÜÁöĄśõīŚä†ÁŹćśÉú tusa malebut tusa idaw ku tulu, ainiw tu.2023ŚĻīŚć≥ŚįáŚąįšĺÜ u kapahay katayni , laecusay banatu, saekeng tu udip kaytini tu, u imelang kayada tu, daesu han naku ku mamin nay a laluma'an cabay. saekeng han! sakapah han! salihalay han !ŚĀ•Śļ∑!ŚĻ≥ŚģČ!ŚŅęś®ā uekeng saicelangen ! malucabay had adauc ! .
S.PHON: sakas…ôn…ôŇčan aku a r~…ĺabaŇč:*******: nika ¶awan namu tu tusa mar~…ĺ…ôbut tusa idaw ku tasa ¶aaj tu pa ¶ub…ôr~…ĺis a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj, anusawni katukuńß tu paŇčiduwan. . sakapańß…ôn musir~…ĺ…ômud ku r~…ĺusid dat…ôŇč…ôn, amana katawar~…ĺ masidsida. . anu mud…ôbu sakamu…ôn namin ku mika ¶awau kukaj ńßan . . anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a ku sasukapańß r~…ĺa…ô ¶us namu, *********, ajda inanipir~…ĺiwku, anu mańßi ¶ańßi ¶a . kapańßaj r~…ĺa…ô ¶usaj.****. pajawan napa ¶abaj tisuwan mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ ńßaw ni ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺan tu tusamar~…ĺ…ôbut tusa idaw ku tusa amińß ¶aan *****. kiju inani pir~…ĺiwku isu kija idaw ku dadat…ôn…ôŇč, idaw ku pitur~…ĺin, idaw ku katin…ôŇč, dat…ôŇč…ônibar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °. . adasaj ńßan naku kita mika ¶awj ar~…ĺabaŇč, sar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ńßan tinasadikudaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj . Ňčaj anu dawniaj a sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj a kaka ¶awan tusa mar~…ĺ…ôbut tusa idaw ku tur~…ĺu amińß ¶aan sakapańß da…ôsu ńßan. ama…ôd…ôm tu ku ajdaaj amińß ¶aan.******** sur~…ĺuńßan naku ku numidukaaj takuwan ******* ańßi ¶an na ¶a ńßan naku ku nidukasn naku.******* kukaj ńßan naku ku majdińßaj takuwan.******* pas…ôpi ńßan tu ku kajdińßan naku.******* namakabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ °mikukaj kaku tu napa ¶abaj takuwan ******* u midat…ôŇčaj takuwan kabir~…ĺir~…ĺ.******* maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° tu kubar~…ĺj ¶u Ē~ ° pańßaŇčanni.******* maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° ku tad…ômaw sar~…ĺińßar~…ĺai ńß…ônaj.******* u mar~…ĺawp…ôsa tu ¶ajaj tu katar~…ĺuma ******* u tajniaj kasa…ôtim.******* tusa mar~…ĺ…ôbut tusa idaw ku tur~…ĺu, ainiw tu.********* u kapańßaj katajni , r~…ĺa…ô ¶usaj banatu, sa…ôk…ôŇč tu udip kajtini tu, u im…ôr~…ĺaŇč kajada tu, da…ôsu ńßan naku ku mamin naj a r~…ĺar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an ¶abaj. sa…ôk…ôŇč ńßan! sakapańß ńßan! sar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj ńßan !**!**!** u…ôk…ôŇč sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč…ôn ! mar~…ĺu ¶abaj ńßad adau ¶ ! .
